overview.description: Czech digital product design and development studio specialising in UX, web/app development, and applied AI innovation.
overview.description_long: Designdev (formerly AW-dev) is a Prague-based studio of designers, architects, and developers of digital products and services. For 10+ years they have built websites, e-shops, and custom applications, and for the past three years have run an internal R&D unit dedicated to real-world AI applications. Their AI services span solution design and architecture, AI process audits, RAG/semantic search, AI agent workflows, AI Vision/ML, generative AI, and MLOps. They joined the Czech Association of Artificial Intelligence (CNAIP) in December 2025.
overview.tagline: Děláme internet lepší (Making the internet better)

history.origin_story: Founded as AW-dev, rebranded to Designdev. Has been operating for ~10 years as of 2025-2026. AI R&D practice launched ~3 years before 2025.

key_milestones.event: Operating as AW-dev (client testimonial references collaboration from 2015)
Launched dedicated AI R&D department (3+ years before 2025)
Became member of Czech Association of Artificial Intelligence (CNAIP)

awards: CNAIP member (Czech Association of Artificial Intelligence, 2025)

metadata.notes: Company was formerly known as AW-dev before rebranding to Designdev. Founded year is estimated ~2015 based on website stating '10 years on market' and a client testimonial referencing collaboration since 2015. No careers/jobs page found (404 at /pridej-se). No Glassdoor data found via snippets. ~16 named team members on About page, so employees_range is 11-50.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Vertical focus (cv) offers some protection, but limited scale or proprietary differentiation signals.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Small team with no visible customer traction or market validation signals.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding information. Sustainability unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Mixed risk profile — some protective factors but also significant vulnerabilities.
